nodes.name: invite-flow.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive state machine specification for the invite flow, covering entity lifecycle, board-side screen states, invite landing states, and sequence diagrams for human and agent invite creation, approval, and claim flows.

nodes.name: ui.md
nodes.summary: Full UI specification for the Paperclip application covering design philosophy, color system, typography, all major views (Issues, Projects, Goals, Dashboard, Org Chart, Agents, Approvals, Costs, Inbox), keyboard shortcuts, URL structure, and a phased implementation priority plan.
nodes.languageNotes: 62 sections across 1001 lines — one of the most detailed spec documents in the project.

nodes.name: TASKS-mcp.md
nodes.summary: Complete MCP (Model Context Protocol) interface specification documenting all task management tools exposed to AI agents, including CRUD operations for issues, workflow states, teams, projects, milestones, labels, issue relations, comments, and initiatives with full parameter schemas.

nodes.name: TASKS.md
nodes.summary: Authoritative data model reference for the task management subsystem, defining entity hierarchy, field schemas, validation rules, and relationships for issues, workflow states, teams, projects, milestones, labels, issue relations, sub-issues, estimates, comments, and initiatives.

nodes.name: UNTRUSTED-PR-REVIEW.md
nodes.summary: Operational guide for running AI-assisted PR reviews inside an isolated Docker container, covering container isolation properties, login steps, safe PR checkout, invoking Codex or Claude, previewing the Paperclip app from the PR branch, and security limits.

nodes.name: .env.aws.example
nodes.summary: Template environment file for AWS ECS Fargate deployment, documenting non-secret runtime variables (deployment mode, server host/port, Paperclip paths, migration flags) while noting that secrets are injected via AWS Secrets Manager.

nodes.name: docker-compose.quickstart.yml
nodes.summary: Minimal single-service Docker Compose file for quickstart deployments that builds the main Dockerfile and exposes port 3100, requiring only BETTER_AUTH_SECRET and optional API keys.

nodes.name: docker-compose.untrusted-review.yml
nodes.summary: Hardened Docker Compose configuration for the untrusted PR review environment, dropping all Linux capabilities, disabling privilege escalation, and using tmpfs for /tmp while providing ports for Paperclip (3100) and Vite (5173).

nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Full development Docker Compose stack defining a PostgreSQL 17 database service with health checks and a server service built from the root Dockerfile, wired together via DATABASE_URL with persistent volumes for both data stores.

nodes.name: Dockerfile.onboard-smoke
nodes.summary: Smoke-test Dockerfile that bootstraps a fresh Ubuntu 24.04 environment, installs Node.js, creates a paperclip user, and runs `npx paperclipai onboard` to validate the published npm package's onboarding flow end-to-end.

nodes.name: ecs-task-definition.json
nodes.summary: AWS ECS Fargate task definition template for the Paperclip service, specifying FARGATE compatibility, network mode, CPU/memory allocations, container definitions with environment variable and secrets manager bindings, CloudWatch log routing, and an EFS volume mount.

nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Minimal Node.js 22 Alpine Dockerfile for the openclaw smoke-test HTTP server, copying server.mjs and exposing port 8787.

nodes.name: server.mjs
nodes.summary: Standalone HTTP smoke-test server for the openclaw gateway adapter, providing in-memory event storage with endpoints for posting agent events, polling events since a given timestamp, and health checks.

nodes.name: paperclip-db.container
nodes.summary: Podman Quadlet systemd container unit for the PostgreSQL 17 database service, including health checks, environment file binding, restart policy, and pod membership for the Paperclip deployment.

nodes.name: paperclip.container
nodes.summary: Podman Quadlet systemd container unit for the main Paperclip server, declaring dependency on the database service, configuring authenticated private deployment mode, and binding the data volume.

nodes.name: paperclip.pod
nodes.summary: Podman Quadlet pod definition that groups the Paperclip application and database containers under a shared network namespace, publishing port 3100.

nodes.name: review-checkout-pr
nodes.summary: Bash script that safely clones or mirrors a GitHub repository inside the untrusted review container and creates an isolated git worktree for the requested PR's head commit, normalizing various GitHub URL formats as input.

nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Dockerfile for the isolated PR review environment, installing development tools (git, gh, fd, ripgrep, Node.js via corepack), creating a non-root reviewer user, and providing the review-checkout-pr script as a convenience command.

nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Four-stage production Dockerfile for the full Paperclip monorepo: a base Node.js layer, a pnpm dependency installation stage, a build stage that compiles UI and server, and a production stage that installs claude-code globally and runs the server via tsx.
nodes.languageNotes: Multi-stage build with explicit per-package.json COPY pattern to maximise Docker layer caching for pnpm workspaces.

nodes.name: adapter-ui-parser.md
nodes.summary: Technical specification for the adapter UI parser contract, documenting how adapter packages expose a `ui-parser` export that converts raw agent stdout into structured TranscriptEntry objects for real-time display in the Paperclip UI, including the full TypeScript interface, lifecycle, error handling, and build/test guidance.

nodes.name: claude-local.md
nodes.summary: Configuration and usage reference for the claude-local adapter, covering prerequisites, all configuration fields, prompt templates, session persistence behavior, skills injection, and an environment test command.

nodes.name: codex-local.md
nodes.summary: Configuration and usage reference for the codex-local adapter, covering prerequisites, configuration fields, session persistence, skills injection, fast mode, managed CODEX_HOME, manual CLI usage, instructions resolution, and environment test.

nodes.name: creating-an-adapter.md
nodes.summary: Step-by-step developer guide for building a Paperclip adapter, detailing package structure, root metadata, the server execute function and its context/result types, environment tests, UI module (built-in only), CLI module, registration, session persistence, capability flags, skills injection, and security considerations.

nodes.name: external-adapters.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive guide for building and publishing external (third-party) Paperclip adapters as standalone npm packages, covering package structure, full TypeScript source examples for all required modules, installation paths (npm, local, adapter-plugins.json), optional session persistence, skills sync, model detection, publishing steps, and security notes.

nodes.name: gemini-local.md
nodes.summary: Configuration and usage reference for the gemini-local adapter, covering prerequisites, configuration fields, session persistence, skills injection, and an environment test command.
